chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No.S-153 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.8194/2017 3. For hearing of main case 29-05-2019 Mr. Abdul Basit Shaikh, Advocate for the appellant.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant under instructions does not press this Criminal Acquittal Appeal, which stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
